page_title: THE END OF EVANGELION: Boku to Iu Kigou
text:
is a book created by Nobi Nobita and published by Gentōsha on 16 July 1997. It is a collection of selected dialogue from the TV episodes of the series with some minor commentary inserted. 

Overview

In keeping with Evangelion's usage of religious symbolism, a psalm can be referred to as:

1. (religion, music) A sacred song; a poetical composition for use in the praise or worship of God.

2. One of the hymns by David and others, collected into one book of the Old Testament, or a modern metrical version of such a hymn for public worship. Wiktionary 

This book is apparently by doujin artist Nobi Nobita https://forum.evageeks.org/post/425333/NGE-Ep24-Script-First-and-Second-Drafts/#425333 , author of Bridal Veil. Doujin that served as inspiration for Episode 22's expanded mental attack scene: https://forum.evageeks.org/thread/17938/Nobi-Nobita-Bridal-Veil-Ep-22-DC-Source and Shinji's choking scene to their kiss scene from Episode 15, by reinserting their dialogue in there.|thumb|left|250px|link=Special:FilePath/End_of_Evangelion_Psalms_Example_Page.jpg]]

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4-87728-171-1
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4-87728-171-7
